textByHash.93e83ce496571361d4d6513103a14962c96a0f64: It will take me some time to track Will and Anne down, but make no mistake, I will find them. I expect you to be ready by the time that happens. Don't be a disappointment.
textByHash.9a56e43ca73f74deb73d2702d5349a02ad0da82d: We'll see. I saw that raft you rocked up in. If that's all you bring to the table, then you have some work to do.
textByHash.ebdb3d3f181813a6331a1fedf805aeb8d90ee85d: Steve tells me you're keen to see Will and Anne dealt with. I'm open to sharing the bounty, but only if you have what it takes. I have no time for layabouts.
textByHash.f3c21726e127927b52254ddd7df81f68a80d3161: Good. Now, that's me done drinking. Time to get to work. I'll keep Steve updated on my progress, so make sure you're checking in with him. He'll let you know once I have something.
